steps.explanation: Find the width of the base. Base area = length × width, so width = 56t ÷ (14/3) = 56t × 3/14 = 12t cm.
Compute the three distinct face areas: base lw = 56t (given), front face lh = (14/3)(3) = 14, side face wh = 12t × 3 = 36t.
Surface area of a rectangular prism = 2(lw + lh + wh) = 2(56t + 14 + 36t) = 2(92t + 14) = 184t + 28.

• A: 112t + 56 — incorrect face calculations.
  • B: 184t + 28 — matches exactly.
  • C: 1,680t + 28 — far too large.
  • D: 168t — missing the constant term, wrong coefficient.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
